properties.markdown:
# NAVADA BACKUP ULTRA
**Purpose**: Weekly full backup of ASUS and HP laptops to Oracle Cloud VM via Tailscale
**Location**: `ubuntu@100.77.206.9:/opt/navada-backup-ultra/`
**Schedule**: Every Sunday at 03:00 AM | **Retention**: All versions kept (rsync --delete syncs latest state)

| Node | Folder | Machine | What's Backed Up |
|---|---|---|---|
| **ASUS** | `/opt/navada-backup-ultra/ASUS/` | Zenbook Duo (100.88.118.128) | CLAUDE_NAVADA_AGENT, Documents, Desktop, .ssh, .claude, VS Code config, opencode |
| **HP** | `/opt/navada-backup-ultra/HP/` | EliteBook 840 G5 (100.121.187.67) | CLAUDE_NAVADA_AGENT, Documents, Desktop, .ssh, .claude |

properties.markdown:
### Recovery Instructions
If a laptop is lost or breaks:
1. SSH to Oracle VM: `ssh ubuntu@100.77.206.9`
2. Navigate to backup: `cd /opt/navada-backup-ultra/ASUS/` or `.../HP/`
3. Read `BACKUP_MANIFEST.txt` for details
4. Copy files to new machine with rsync:
```
rsync -avz ubuntu@100.77.206.9:/opt/navada-backup-ultra/ASUS/ /c/Users/leeak/
```

### Oracle VM Disk
- **Total**: 45 GB | **Used**: ~32 GB | **Free**: ~13 GB
- Backups use incremental rsync (only changed files transfer)

## ASUS Backed Up Files — CLAUDE_NAVADA_AGENT (677 MB)
| Folder | Size | Contents |
|---|---|---|
| `Automation/` | 343 MB | Telegram bot, inbox responder, network scanner, voice command, AI news mailer |
| `Manager/` | 45 MB | Manager/org tools, team ops |
| `worldmonitor-proxy/` | 9.1 MB | WorldMonitor proxy config |
| `navada-osint/` | 916 KB | WorldMonitor source (Next.js intelligence dashboard) |
| `navada-robotics-landing/` | 700 KB | Robotics landing page |
| `templates/` | 696 KB | Email/doc templates |
| `LeadPipeline/` | 472 KB | Lead pipeline automation |
| `NAVADA-Trading/` | 144 KB | Trading API + scheduler |
| `infrastructure/` | 84 KB | Infrastructure configs |
| `crow_theme/` | 68 KB | Crow theme assets |
| `gradio-mcp/` | 28 KB | Gradio MCP integration |
| `tensorboard-demo/` | 12 KB | ML tensorboard demo |

### CI/CD — Gitea + Jenkins on Oracle VM
| Service | URL (via Tailscale) | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Gitea** (Private Git) | `http://100.77.206.9:3002` | Private repos for NAVADA Edge code — no public exposure |
| **Jenkins** (CI/CD) | `http://100.77.206.9:8082/jenkins` | Build, test, deploy pipelines for all NAVADA projects |
| **Portainer** | `http://100.77.206.9:9000` | Docker container management |
| **Grafana** | `http://100.77.206.9:3000` | Monitoring dashboards |
